articles.title: Dundee 2-1 Motherwell
articles.summary: Watch highlights from the Scottish Premiership match between Dundee and Motherwell.

articles.title: Eze stunner spares Arsenal from Mansfield upset
articles.summary: Arsenal's Eberechi Eze comes off the bench to score the winning goal against League One side Mansfield, sending the Gunners through to the FA Cup quarter-finals.

articles.title: 'What happens next, happens' - Lindsay coy on NI future
articles.summary: Northern Ireland interim manager Kris Lindsay says it is "up to the powers that be" at the Irish FA to decide whether he will be appointed as permanent boss.

articles.title: VAR breaks Wrexham hearts as lacklustre Chelsea win six-goal thriller
articles.summary: Wrexham were denied a dramatic goal in extra-time by VAR with Alejandro Garnacho and Joao Pedro securing an unconvincing 4-2 win to book Chelsea's place in the FA Cup quarter-finals.

articles.title: Motherwell's title race push blown off course with loss at Dundee
articles.summary: Motherwell’s hopes of gatecrashing the Scottish Premiership title race suffered a blow when they fell to a 2-1 defeat at Dundee.

articles.title: Early goals send Falkirk to Scottish Cup semi-finals
articles.summary: Two early goals help Falkirk make it by Dundee United to reach the Scottish Cup semi-finals.

articles.title: Bayern hammer Monchengladbach to move 14 points clear
articles.summary: Bayern Munich win their fifth match in a row with a 4-1 win over Borussia Monchengladbach, to move to 14 points clear at the top of the Bundesliga table.

articles.title: 'As pure as you can hit it!' Robertson fires Liverpool into lead
articles.summary: Liverpool left-back Andrew Robertson scores a superb opening goal for his side in their FA Cup fifth round tie against Wolves at Molineux.

articles.title: 'We don't know what is a foul' - Nuno wants set-piece review
articles.summary: With increased attention on grappling at corner kicks in the Premier League, West Ham head coach Nuno Espirito Santo wants officials to explain what is and is not a foul.

articles.title: 'Slot needs something to keep him in a job' - could the FA Cup be it?
articles.summary: Despite a torrid Premier League campaign, could winning the FA Cup keep Liverpool manager Arne Slot in a job?

articles.title: Who is to blame for Spurs' chaotic descent towards relegation?
articles.summary: BBC Sport's chief football writer Phil McNulty examines who - or what - is to blame for Spurs' crisis as they fight to avoid relegation.

articles.title: 'Howard Webb, where are you?' - How we can stop VAR ruining football
articles.summary: In his BBC Sport column, former Premier League boss Tony Pulis explains how VAR has become a monster, and why people in the game should be asked how to fix it.

articles.title: Pressure mounts on Tudor as Tottenham lose at home to Palace
articles.summary: Tottenham stay just one point above the Premier League relegation zone following a 3-1 home defeat by Crystal Palace, having had to play more than 45 minutes with 10 men after Micky van de Ven was sen...

articles.title: 'The reaction was great' - Glasner proud as Palace fight back to beat Spurs
articles.summary: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner praises his team's reaction as they fight back from a goal down to beat Spurs 3-1 at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with all the goals coming in the first half.

articles.title: 'Don't be so ridiculous' - Richards & Murphy debate Haaland penalty decision
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Micah Richards and Danny Murphy debate if Matz Sels' collision with Erling Haaland should have resulted in a penalty for Manchester City.

articles.title: Scotland fire seven past Luxembourg in World Cup qualifying
articles.summary: Watch as Scotland beat Luxembourg 7-0 in their Women's World Cup qualifier at Hampden Park to go top of Group B4 ahead of Belgium on goal difference.
